heading: Definitions
label: 4916 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 88c–4 of this titleSection is based on section 4 of House Resolution No. 234, Ninety-eighth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .June 29, 1983Pub. L. 98–367
Effective DateSection effective , see note set out under .June 29, 1983section 4914 of this title

children.text: “academic year” means a regular school year, consisting of two semesters;
“page” means a page of the House of Representatives, but such term does not include a full time, permanent employee of the House of Representatives with supervisory responsibility for pages; and
“congressional page” means a page of the House of Representatives or the Senate.
